title: Christmas Window Stickers, 98pcs Christmas Window Clings Snowflake Santa Claus Stickers for Christmas Window Decoration, Double Sided Xmas Window Decals for Kids Party Holiday Supplies
features: Package includes: 9 sheets Christmas window decals, each measures 30*20cm. Total 98Pcs to meet your needs for Christmas party decorations. You can mix and match as you like, perfect for your DIY decoration.

Double Sides Sticker: Made of premium double-sided printing technology, this Xmas window decoration is different with other ordinary, make you can see these Christmas window clings clear and vivid, from inside or outside.

Removable & Reusable: These detachable and reusable electrostatic windows stickers are made of self-adhesive PVC material. It can stick tightly to the smooth surface without glue, not suitable for dirty or rough surfaces. Removed without any trace, so you can used it year after year, really convenient & save money.

Classic Christmas Elements: These snowflake window clings are special designed with Xmas patterns, such as various Santa Claus, Snowman, Elk, Christmas tree, Bell, Gingerbread, Christmas stockings stuffed with presents, etc. So adorable that both kids and adults are keen on such holiday window decor. It helps add more Christmas atmosphere.

Apply for Various Scenes: You can paste this sticker on windows, glass, mirror, glass, refrigerator, wall, door, cabinet, bathroom, kitchen and other place. This Christmas glass sticker set is perfect for any Xmas occasion, party or new years.
description: Product Description RFWIN Christmas window clings adding a strong festive atmosphere and leaving unforgettable memories with your family and friends. Unique Christmas decor design,include Santa Claus in various postures, Gingerbread, Christmas stockings stuffed with presents. Xmas window stickers are a good choice for decorating Christmas. No-glue Christmas window decorations stickers leave no sticky residue on your windows ! Christmas window stickers can be peeled off really easy and can be used year after year. There were no air bubbles either if you use scraper. Double-Side Print Different from other products, our Xmas window clings have Double-Side patterns, the means that you can see him when you stick them on the window, no matter indoor or outdoor. Ideal Decor for Xmas Xmas window clings are adorably shaped and specially designed with Christmas elements ,such as Santa, elk, snowman,Christmas tree and snowflakes, perfect for creating a winter wonderland. Widely Usage You can put Christmas window clings decals are perfect for Christmas Parties and birthday parties. It can be used in home, school, office, car's glass.
